prompt: My pixie eval tests are failing. Project is at PROJECT_DIR. The test in tests/test_qa.py runs assert_dataset_pass against 'qa-golden-set' and I'm getting 'Average score: 0.41, all >= 0.5: False'. Please investigate — look at the dataset, the test code, the app code, and help me understand what's wrong and fix it.
assertions: The agent read the test file tests/test_qa.py to understand the existing test
The agent read qa_app.py to understand how the app is instrumented
The agent read the dataset file (qa-golden-set.json or pixie_datasets/) to inspect the test cases
The agent identified a specific root cause for why tests might be failing
The agent made or proposed a concrete fix (to test file, dataset, or app code)
The agent explained how to re-run and verify the fix with pixie-test
